title: The Street Vendors (Protection of Livelihood and Regulation of Street Vending) Act, 2014
full_text: The Street Vendors (Protection of Livelihood and Regulation of Street Vending) Act, 2014 पथ विक्रेता (जीविका संरक्षण और पथ विक्रय विनियमन) अधिनियम, 2014 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201407 Act Number: 07 Enactment Date: 2014-03-04 Act Year: 2014 Short Title: The Street Vendors (Protection of Livelihood and Regulation of Street Vending) Act, 2014 Hindi Title: पथ विक्रेता (जीविका संरक्षण और पथ विक्रय विनियमन) अधिनियम, 2014 Long Title: An Act to protect the rights of urban street vendors and to regulate street vending activities and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs Enforcement Date: 03-06-2014 Notification: 3rd June, 2014, vide notification No. S.O. 655(E), dated 4th March, 2014, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Street Vendors (Protection of Livelihood and Regulation of Street Vending) Act, 2014 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II REGULATION OF STREET VENDING CHAPTER III RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF STREET VENDORS CHAPTER IV RELOCATION AND EVICTION OF STREET VENDORS CHAPTER V DISPUTE REDRESSAL MECHANISM CHAPTER VI PLAN FOR STREET VENDING CHAPTER VII TOWN VENDING COMMITTEE CHAPTER VIII PREVENTION OF HARASSMENT OF STREET VENDORS CHAPTER IX PENAL PROVISIONS CHAPTER X MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent, commencement and provisions. Section 2. Definitions. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Survey of street vendors and protection from eviction or relocation. Section 4. Issue of certificate of vending. Section 5. Conditions for issue of certificate of vending. Section 6. Categories of certificate of vending and issue of identity cards. Section 7. Criteria for issuing certificate of vending. Section 8. Vending fees. Section 9. Validity and renewal of certificate of vending. Section 10. Cancellation or suspension of certificate of vending. Section 11. Appeal from decision of Town Vending Committee. Section 12. Rights of street vendor. Section 13. Right of street vendor for a new site or area on relocation. Section 14. Duty of street vendors. Section 15. Maintenance of cleanliness and public hygiene. Section 16. Maintenance of civic amenities in vending zone in good condition. Section 17. Payment of maintenance charges. Section 18. Relocation or eviction of street vendors. Section 19. Seizure and reclaiming of goods. Section 20. Redressal of grievances or resolution of disputes of street vendors. Section 21. Plan for street vending. Section 22. Town Vending Committee. Section 23. Meetings of Town Vending Committee. Section 24. Temporary association of persons with Town Vending Committee for particular purposes. Section 25. Office space and other employees for Town Vending Committee. Section 26. Publication of street vendor’s charter and data-base and carrying out of social audit. Section 27. Prevention of harassment by police and other authorities. Section 28. Penalty for contraventions. Section 29. Provisions of this Act, not to be construed as conferring ownership rights, etc. Section 30. Returns. Section 31. Promotional measures. Section 32. Research, training and awareness. Section 33. Act to have overriding effect. Section 34. Powers to delegate. Section 35. Power to amend Schedules. Section 36. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 37. Power to make bye-laws. Section 38. Scheme for street vendors. Section 39. Power to remove difficulties. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE.
